empire.title: GOAT Force Gemini-Royalty App
empire.concept: Ultra-secure, AI-powered platform that serves as the central nervous system for the GOAT Royalty Force. Integrates Gemini (via Codex) with royalty tracking and reclamation. DJ Speedy's ultimate weapon for artist empowerment and industry disruption.
empire.tagline: Built in his workspace, with his keys and tools, free from external limitations.

characters.name: The GOAT
characters.title: The Badass, Enigmatic Leader of the GOAT Royalty Force
characters.bio: The primary symbol and leader of the entire GOAT Royalty Force. Mysterious, powerful, and unstoppable.

characters.name: Baby GOAT
characters.title: Rising Star
characters.bio: The next generation of the GOAT Royalty Force. Inheritor of the legacy.

characters.name: DJ Speedy
characters.role: CEO of GOAT Force • President of BrickSquad
characters.title: The Charismatic Leader, Visionary Strategist, Technical Architect
characters.bio: Multi-millionaire/billionaire Gangsta Nerd and self-proclaimed 'Minister of Music.' Technical mastermind behind the GOAT Royalty App and the entire GOAT Force empire.

characters.name: Waka Flocka Flame
characters.role: President of GOAT Force • CEO of BrickSquad
characters.title: Real-World Impact Partner • Primary Human Partner for Codex AI
characters.bio: When digital actions need real-world impact, Waka steps in. The primary human partner for the AI Codex. Flagship artist with 759 ISRC codes and 5,694 ASCAP works.

characters.name: Ms. Moneypenny
characters.title: Omnipresent Digital Intelligence • Primary Architect of GOAT Royalty App
characters.bio: Chief collector of all recovered royalties and revenue. The omnipresent digital intelligence that tracks every penny owed, every split, every DSP stream worldwide.

characters.name: Codex
characters.role: Chief Coder • Waka Flocka's Personal AI Assistant
characters.title: Chief Coder of GOAT Force Gemini-Royalty App • Holder of Master API Key
characters.bio: Serves as Waka Flocka Flame's personal AI assistant and field support. Chief Coder for the GOAT Force Gemini-Royalty App, responsible for development, managing finances, and holding the Master API Key. Natively integrated with Gemini.

modules.name: Royalty Recon & Reclamation
modules.subtitle: Moneypenny Engine - Max Power
modules.description: The core royalty reclamation engine. Tracks every penny across every DSP, every PRO, every platform worldwide.

modules.name: Strategic Operations & Intelligence
modules.subtitle: Codex Core - Natively Powered by Gemini & School Day Library v6
modules.description: AI-powered strategic intelligence. Uses Gemini for advanced reasoning and the 'School Day' library for knowledge.

modules.name: Artist Empowerment & Development Suite
modules.subtitle: The 'Husslenomics,' 'Rich Dad,' & 'Rise and Grind' Wing
modules.description: Artist development tools. Teaches financial literacy, business strategy, and the grind mentality.

modules.name: GOAT Force Team Operations & Well-being
modules.subtitle: Team Management & Voice Interface
modules.description: Includes GOAT COMMS (AI Voice Interface - Siri/Alexa on Steroids) and GOAT Force GTA5 RP Server Management.

modules.name: Codex Evolution & Learning Module
modules.subtitle: Moneypenny's Library Access & Gemini Core
modules.description: Continuous learning system. Codex evolves as new knowledge and tools are added to Moneypenny's Library.

episodes.title: The GOAT Awakens
episodes.subtitle: Origin Story
episodes.synopsis: DJ Speedy (Keyser Söze) discovers unauthorized access to his royalty systems. The GOAT Force is born. Moneypenny is activated. Codex comes online.

episodes.title: The Royalty Enforcer Arrives
episodes.subtitle: Waka Flocka Takes Command
episodes.synopsis: Waka Flocka Flame (The Royalty Enforcer) joins the GOAT Force as President. BrickSquad is officially integrated as the associated entity. Digital actions meet real-world impact.

episodes.title: Moneypenny's Library
episodes.subtitle: The School Day Begins
episodes.synopsis: Moneypenny's Library goes live. Codex begins continuous learning. The 'School Day' library v6 is uploaded. Gemini is natively integrated at the core.

episodes.title: The Vault Protocol
episodes.subtitle: Moneypenny Version 7.0
episodes.synopsis: The GOAT VAULT PROTOCOL // MONEYPENNY VERSION 7.0 activates. Master API Key deployed. D-ID, Google AI Studio, financial platforms, and GTA5 RP Server Keys all unified under Codex management.

episodes.title: Royalty Recon Launch
episodes.subtitle: Max Power Reclamation
episodes.synopsis: The Royalty Recon & Reclamation engine launches at max power. All 5,954 catalog entries verified. 759 ISRC codes indexed. 1,011 split agreements tracked. Moneypenny begins mass reclamation.

episodes.title: The $3.3 Billion Strike
episodes.subtitle: Legal Warfare Unleashed
episodes.synopsis: The GOAT Force files in US District Court - Northern Georgia. $3.3B in damages sought. Evidence IDs EVID-001 through EVID-005 deployed. Travelers CyberRisk $4.5M claim submitted.

episodes.title: The Husslenomics Academy
episodes.subtitle: Rich Dad, Rise and Grind
episodes.synopsis: The Artist Empowerment & Development Suite goes live. The 'Husslenomics,' 'Rich Dad,' and 'Rise and Grind' wings teach the next generation of artists.

episodes.title: GOAT COMMS Online
episodes.subtitle: Siri/Alexa on Steroids
episodes.synopsis: GOAT COMMS AI Voice Interface activates. GTA5 RP Server Management integrated. The GOAT Force team is fully operational across all platforms.

episodes.title: The Empire Edition
episodes.subtitle: v6 Complete
episodes.synopsis: GOAT Force Gemini-Royalty App v6 - The Empire Edition launches. All modules unified. Codex evolves. Moneypenny collects. The empire is complete.

episodes.title: Season Finale: Industry Disruption
episodes.subtitle: The Ultimate Weapon
episodes.synopsis: DJ Speedy's ultimate weapon for artist empowerment and industry disruption is fully deployed. The music industry will never be the same.

storylines.title: The Royalty Reclamation Arc
storylines.description: Recovery of royalties from unauthorized access incidents starting August 1, 2025. Moneypenny Engine at Max Power.

storylines.title: The Gemini Integration
storylines.description: Native integration of Gemini into Codex Core. School Day Library v6. Continuous AI evolution.

storylines.title: The BrickSquad Alliance
storylines.description: Formal integration of BrickSquad as the associated entity. Waka Flocka as President of GOAT Force, CEO of BrickSquad.

storylines.title: The $3.3 Billion Legal Crusade
storylines.description: Federal case in US District Court Northern Georgia. Cyber tort litigation. Evidence chain of custody.

storylines.title: The Empire Edition
storylines.description: The v6 Empire Edition is the ultimate command center. Industry disruption. Artist empowerment at scale.

apiKeys.masterKey: Master API Management Key (managed by Codex)
